description: 轻灵 Qling — local-first Chinese AI Agent CLI workbench
notes: DRAFT manifest — not in an official Scoop bucket yet (private/local bucket only).
Requires Node.js >= 18 on PATH (better-sqlite3 may need VS Build Tools).
hash is SHA256 of the npm tarball for @qlingzzy/qling@1.1.0 (registry.npmjs.org).
npm tarball has no Windows bin shim; post_install falls back to npm global install.
API keys must be set as user environment variables (never commit secrets).
post_install: Write-Host 'npm package extracted; if qling is missing from PATH, run:' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host 'Then: qling bootstrap && qling setup' -ForegroundColor Cyan
